title: Feedback - the thank you card after sending the feedback
scenario: "Thank You" feedback confirmation card does not auto-dismiss after 5 seconds or respond to back button in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the Account icon or menu option.
4. Scroll down and select 'Send Feedback' or 'Feedback'.
5. Fill in the feedback form with relevant details (optional).
6. Tap the 'Submit' or 'Send' button to submit the feedback.
7. Observe the 'Thank You' card/note that appears on the screen after submission.
expected: A "Thank You" card/note is displayed on the screen. The note should remain visible for approximately 5 seconds and then automatically disappear. Alternatively, the user can dismiss the note immediately by pressing the back button.
